docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,399.77 FILED BY MEHTA, LIZA AS TO DEFENDANT K.C, RAKESH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LIZA MEHTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAKESH K.C IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEHTA, LIZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT K.C, RAKESH $10,399.77 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,474.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-13-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT K.C, RAKESH
